name: Zengence: Take Aim with Every Breath

reviews.review_description: I can't say enough good things about this fantastic app. I believe ZENGENCE is probably the most essential app ever created to improve quality of life on any platform. There are many apps that help improve one's life (meditation & exercise) but this is the first one I've used that combines the two elements in such a creative, innovative & awesome way. In addition, the music, visuals, soundfx & gameplay are all Top-Level. After playing it for the last few months I concluded that Zengence is the most important app you could have for your Quest. Our physical & mental health are essential to a good quality of life. In my experience staticity never helps with having a sound mind & body. Proper breathing & movement are essential to managing (& can play a hand in curing) depression. Not only is ZENGENCE a blast to play, but I find myself using the breathing techniques in times of stress at work & in traffic. It does wonders in slowing my heart right down & helping me think more clearly. After owning a Quest for 7 yrs & acquiring 300+ apps, there's no app I play more than Zengence. I rank it up there with my other favorites: Pistol Whip, Smash Drums, Mini Golf, etc. Don't hesitate to purchase ZENGENCE. I promise you won't regret it & you'll be thrilled with the results 👍

reviews.review_title: Fantastic! Make sure to belly breathe
reviews.review_description:
This game is fantastic! I was a little skeptical about the idea of "gamifying" meditation, but this game gets you to practice breathing deeply and moving, which are great for mental health! I feel energetic, alert, and happy after playing three levels. What a wonderful way to practice deep-breathing in stressful situations! 

Make sure to take full, deep breaths in the game. It could help to put one hand on your lower stomach and make sure your stomach pushes out as you breathe in. That should help those struggling with getting light-headed during the game.

Recommendation for the developers: I think a tutorial walking people through "belly breathing" would be very helpful. Maybe something at the beginning with more of a visual to help people practice breathing deeply. For those that have done yoga, singing, or other activities that require full diaphragmatic breaths, the breathing in the game comes a lot easier. Those that aren't used to taking full breaths might have a hard time without additional training at the beginning of the game.

I am so excited about this game! Thank you to the developers for bringing an active, mental health-boosting game to the VR realm!

I put on the coffee, and thought I’ll try this game for five minutes. Half an hour later I’m still in the game, who cares about coffee? It’s entrancing, engaging, beautiful, satisfying. It’s billed as a mental health tool, but it is not only about coping with trouble, it’s about enhancing the good in your life, too. Using control of your breathing as a weapon teaches you to use it as a tool and a home base and a friend when you need one.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your experience with Zengence! Your insight about the game being not just a mental health tool but also a means to enhance the good in life really captures the essence of what we aimed to achieve. Using controlled breathing as a gameplay mechanism that doubles as a life skill is exactly the kind of transformative experience we hoped to offer. Thank you for embracing it so fully and for recognizing its deeper value. We’re thrilled to have you as part of our community and look forward to bringing even more enriching experiences to you in the future.

reviews.review_description: Bought this because I was curious what exactly the description meant. Never seen anything like it… if you are adventurous and like to try new game mechanics I would recommend giving this a try! Made me feel really cool!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for giving Zengence a try and for your enthusiastic recommendation! We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed exploring its unique mechanics. It’s always exciting to hear from players who appreciate the innovation we’re striving to bring to the gaming and wellness spaces. We hope Zengence continues to inspire and entertain you. Thanks again for your adventurous spirit and for sharing your experience.

reviews.review_description:
Super awesome innovative game mechanics with very chill atmospherics. It’s like if a breath meditation game dreamed of being Pistol Whip in its early days. I can see it growing in the future with more levels and customization, but at the minute it’s a very good zen experience that helps you have fun and get in a flow.

It does have a bit of a learning curve finding a tone that “counts”. I have to use a higher pitched hum. Besides additional levels and customization, I would love to see mic EQ adjustment options to finetune the core mechanic for different voices/intonations. 

Super good chill game that puts you in a zen state while having fun and not feeling bored or static, which I find is a challenge for most people starting breath meditation. 

What a fantastic take on the concept. 

I will note that this is much more of a rhythm meditation game than a shooter, but that is a small aspect (with extremely heavy auto-aim). I like that about it, but you shouldn’t expect a FPS experience. It’s more about finding flow than taking aim. 

Highly recommend even if there are no further updates, but I also see massive potential for future growth.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you so much for your fantastic review and for diving deep into the unique aspects of Zengence. We love hearing that the game's innovative mechanics and tranquil atmospherics have provided you with a fun, zen experience that keeps you engaged.

We appreciate your feedback on the learning curve associated with finding the right tone. We’re always looking to refine our game mechanics to ensure a seamless experience for all players, and your suggestion about adding mic EQ adjustment options is a brilliant idea. We'll definitely look into how we can implement this feature to accommodate a wider range of voices and intonations.

We’re excited about the potential for future growth and adding more levels and customization options as you mentioned. Your support and insights are incredibly inspiring as we continue to develop and enhance the game. Highly appreciate your recommendation, and we look forward to bringing even more to the Zengence experience!

reviews.review_description: Love the art direction, colors, designs, music and the game mechanics are unique and fun! Incorporating vocal sound as a mechanic other than just the controllers is something I've never seen before and a refreshing and creative take that pushing VR games in a new direction. And the music fits in perfectly with the visuals.

developer_response.body: We're thrilled you enjoyed every aspect of Zengence, from its art direction to its innovative mechanics! It's fantastic to hear that our use of vocal toning resonated with you and added a refreshing twist to the VR experience. Thank you for recognizing our efforts to push boundaries in game design. Your support means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description:
This is a great idea for mixing gaming and meditation and VR is a platform meant for stuff like this. The Garden mode provides a beautiful and calm setting to simply enjoy a moment's peace, with a visual guide to control your breath and a lovely scenery to enjoy so your mind doesn't wander off. Meanwhile, the main gameplay mode features a good mix of action and breath control. It also has quite a variety of scenery and shooting styles so for the moment it hasn't felt repetitive. Depending on the mood you are in; you could either settle down to your chair (or the floor as I preferred) for a 15 minute Garden session, or fire away variety of spells at 'enemies' while dodging bullets in a more active manner. All in all, great idea with an on-point use of VR.

It could definitely be expanded further with future updates too which is always a plus.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your thoughtful review! We're thrilled you appreciate the concept of Zengence and its execution. It's great to hear you found both the Zen Garden and main gameplay engaging and diverse. Your feedback is invaluable, and we'll definitely consider expanding the game further in future updates. Keep exploring and finding your balance in VR!

reviews.review_title: Game where you can truly unwind
reviews.review_description:
Zengence is a game in the vein of Tetris Effect in the sense that you can relax and unwind in a completely different way. Its an on rail shooter where you reveal enemies by humming (if you have family maybe don't play this in the middle of a night)

Good game :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts! We're delighted you found Zengence to be a relaxing yet engaging experience. We appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: Very cool premise.  I love having to take a moment to reveal the enemies.  Great soundtrack and feedback with the humming mechanic.  The variety of weapons is a nice touch too.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support! We are thrilled you enjoy the full experience of Zengence! Keep humming and mastering those weapons!

reviews.review_description:
Cannot recommend this game enough. It’s so unique in its mechanics.

IF YOU’RE STRESSED AND OVERWHELMED, THIS GAME IS FOR YOU.

It utilizes not only breathing but humming - like Ohm, Aum or Om. Why is this beneficial? It tones your vagal nerve muscle. Something I am well versed in how beneficial it is. To see it gamified is innovative. 

What is your vagus nerve you ask? (Or maybe you didn’t but you should want to know!)

The vagus nerve is like your body's personal chill-out button, running from your brainstem through your neck and into your abdomen. It's not just any nerve; it's like a superhighway of relaxation and balance. Its main gig is to keep your body's internal systems in harmony, regulating things like your heartbeat, digestion, and even mood. When you exercise this nerve, it's like giving your body a spa day—it can help reduce stress, improve your mood, and enhance overall well-being. So, think of it as your secret weapon for staying calm and centered.

On the flip side, if your vagus nerve tone is low, you might experience issues like digestive problems, anxiety, and difficulty with emotional regulation. It's like your body's relaxation system is a bit out of tune, leading to a less harmonious state of being. That's why exercising your vagus nerve through techniques like deep breathing, meditation, or even singing can be incredibly beneficial—it's like giving your body's chill-out button a much-needed tune-up.

I feel so grounded after playing. 100% recommend.

developer_response.body: Thanks a bunch for the phenomenal review! We're thrilled you found Zengence's mechanics to be groundbreaking and beneficial for relaxation. It's incredible to hear how the game's utilization of breathing and humming resonated with you, tapping into the power of the vagus nerve. Your recommendation is greatly appreciated—keep on grounding yourself and finding peace with Zengence!

reviews.review_description: I recently had the pleasure of trying out Zengence for improving my mental health. And I must say, it was an interesting and enjoyable experience. The game uses vocalizations and humming as a technique to help control breathing. And I was fascinated to learn that humming can stimulate the vagus nerve, which plays a crucial role in relaxation and stress reduction. The app was not only educational, but it was also fun. I was shooting cloaked wraiths while moving through a hall. I found myself laughing at the funny noises I was making which added an element of joy to the experience and my initial amusement. The game effectively guided me to a state of calmness and relaxation. After playing it a few times I noticed a significant improvement in my mental state. And I feel more relaxed than I had anticipated, which is a pleasant surprise. I highly recommend giving it a try if you're interested in improving your mental health in a fun and interactive way. Kudos to the Zengence team.

Game looks beautiful and has a nice chill soundtrack but unfortunately I was unable to get past the tutorial with just loud breaths or humming alone. Only a sharp whistle and/or singing at a very high pitch moved the ball for me and 'normal' toning or chanting really doesn't have any effect. 

Honestly, I couldn't stand hearing myself after playing for only a minute on the first level! 

Could be mic issues on my end, I'm on an old Q2. Maybe the mic on Q3 is more sensitive/responsive to deeper bass tones? Anyway, it's unplayable for me like this so will have to request a refund which is a shame as the concept is great.

developer_response.body: Hello Ringwithorb, thank you for your honest feedback. We're truly sorry to learn that the microphone wasn’t picking up your vocal toning as expected, which certainly detracts from the immersive experience we aim to provide. We're actively working on adding in a few more tips and tricks and we have noticed with deep bass tones the mic can struggle a bit. Our tip right now is to exhale for a full 4 count keeping your toning strong at a bit of a higher pitch, if possible. We also plan to release an update soon that will include better onboarding and helpful tips for optimizing your experience.  We really appreciate your patience and thank you for giving Zengence a try, we hope you will  try us again in the near future. Thank you. If you are feeling up to providing us with a bit more information to help troubleshoot the issue please send us an email at support@DeepWellDTX.com.

reviews.review_description: I left zengence feeling relaxed and ready to play more! The breathing exercises you do while fighting was fun and a relaxing experiences. The soundtrack is amazing and each level looks and feels different with increased difficulty the more you do.  If you just want to relax and mediate there is a garden you can do that in. The more you complete your breathing in the garden the prettier it is.

I’m suspicious that the developers are posting 5 star reviews for themselves because this game is a mess. 

The VRgrids review was good. Music is great and art is (mostly) good but the need to constantly make sound to play is annoying and makes me dizzy. They should have it be optional or at least only part of the level. 

Maybe their next game will be better but don’t waste your time with this one.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to review.

reviews.review_description:
I started playing this as a game... Now it's my break time activity. I was falling asleep at my desk and decided to play a bit. One or two songs and sesh in the zen garden is the perfect way to wake up your brain and get the blood flowing.

I'm really looking forward to unlocking more and going further! The only thing I'd wishlist is an option for shorter breathing sessions. 5 minutes is a looooong time for my adhd brain and also very intense for a beginner.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the glowing review! We're thrilled to hear that Zengence has become your go-to break-time activity! It's great that the Zen Garden sessions provide a refreshing boost to your day.  We'll certainly take your suggestion for shorter breathing sessions into consideration for future updates. Your feedback means a lot—keep on enjoying the journey with Zengence!

reviews.review_description: I loved the game, lots of fun. I can’t say I’ve ever played a game that was both relaxing and exhilarating at the same time!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review! We're glad you loved Zengence. Bringing relaxation and exhilaration together was our goal, and we're delighted it resonated with you.

reviews.review_description: I love this game/meditation. I can feel my breath wake up each cell of my body. The visuals are fun and I feel challenged. Only one complaint. I’d really like to see a setting to keep shooting without pushing the trigger constantly. This movement cramps my finger and hand and it takes me out of the experience. I stay, in pain, to get to next level, but it ceases to be fun at that point.

developer_response.body: Hi Azazael8, Hello, thank you so much for your wonderful feedback and for sharing your experience with Zengence!  This review was such a delight to read. We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the game and feeling the positive effects of the breathwork meditation. We appreciate your suggestion regarding the shooting mechanism. We understand how important it is to maintain comfort and immersion throughout the game, and we're always looking for ways to enhance gameplay. Curious how many levels you were able to play through? We do have several different weapons that have slightly different shoot mechanics and I we would love to know if this was the case for various weapons. If you have more feedback regarding this, please email us at Support@deepwelldtx.com. We will definitely pass this info onto our devs. We will be making constant improvements with future updates. Your enjoyment and comfort are paramount to us, and we're grateful for your input as it helps us make Zengence even better. Thanks for sticking with us, and we hope to enhance your experience even more soon!

reviews.review_description: Cool game concept, but in order to play, you have to "hum," "chant," or make noise the entire time in order to send out your orb. There's a killer soundtrack playing, but I can't hear it, because I have to hum the entire time. My dogs have been barking every time I play, and roommates have been nocking on my door asking what I'm doing. It's a shame, because it's an otherwise beautiful game. If I didn't hae to make noise the entire time I'm playing, it could be a lot of fun, but as is, I can't play more than 5 minutes without getting annoyed, and bothering everyone in my household.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to review.

reviews.review_description: Exciting gameplay that keeps you alert and on your toes, but then also forces you to calm down and focus on your breathing. Interesting game mechanic that I've never seen before!

reviews.review_title: Greta game! Hope to see more levels
reviews.review_description:
The game is great to train breathing! And give some entertainmet too! 
I hope to see more developmet in zen garden
